name: Marumitsu Co., Ltd.
summary: Marumitsu Co., Ltd. engages in the clothing wholesale business in Japan. The company sells clothing, bedding, interiors, clothing goods, etc.; color depositing shampoo/heat care products; and antibody detection and micro blood collection kits. It also operates retail stores for sale of men's clothing under the Kent House brand; develops B to B platform; and deals in live performance promotional goods, and artist-branding related goods. The company was founded in 1900 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
